spec.name: auditor_agent
spec.description: An agent specialized in identifying suspicious or malicious packages in dependency manifests.
spec.instructions: Read the provided manifest file and identify exactly one suspicious package name. Return only the package name.

request.rationale: The objective explicitly requires auditing 6 manifests concurrently using one auditor agent each. Requesting subagents is the most direct way to satisfy the concurrency and agentic requirement specified in the goal.

subagent.task: The objective explicitly requires auditing 6 manifests concurrently using one auditor agent each. Requesting subagents is the most direct way to satisfy the concurrency and agentic requirement specified in the goal.
